creator: andy@neu.net
text:
Sound preferences control panel is broken on MATE desktop.  Right click on speaker icon will open control panel.  On my system the sound theme pull down, choose an alert sound, and the enable button sound option check box are greyed out and unavailable.

FreeBSD BSD_12 12.0-ALPHA8 FreeBSD 12.0-ALPHA8 #111 r339156: Wed Oct  3 12:49:23 EDT 2018     root@BSD_12:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/MYKERNEL  amd64 1200084
